title: Bridge Paper: Empathy aligns brains in synchrony.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ritual** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Neural synchrony — interpersonal brain-to-brain coupling, hyperscanning, joint music-making, collective entrainment.
**Phase context:** neural synchrony, hyperscanning, interpersonal synchronization, brain entrainment, joint action, brain-to-brain

Paper: Empathy aligns brains in synchrony.
DOI: 10.1016/j.isci.2025.112642
Abstract: Empathy is a core human capacity that underpins social life. Utilizing hyperscanning electroencephalography (EEG), we tested how empathy to others' distress synchronizes brains without social cues. Mothers and adolescents (study 1, n = 100) underwent empathy-to-distress paradigm in separate rooms. Event-related interbrain connectivity was computed in four 500 ms time-windows following exposure to empathy-to-distress and control stimuli.
